description: Fast name-to-ID resolution without building a full graph. Returns matching items with their IDs, types, and workspace context. Ideal for agents that know item names but need IDs for subsequent API calls.
notes: Resolve spec format: Type:Name pairs separated by commas. Case-insensitive matching on both type and name. If an item is not found, the entry includes an error field instead of id/type. This is faster than a full scan — only workspace resolution + item listing needed (no graph construction).

query_examples.description: Get the ID of the first resolved item.
Find items that could not be resolved.
